NOM:interaction.name: InnerMLSStatus
NOM:interaction.semantics: Send Internal MLS status(LauncherControlManager to CommunicationManager)

NOM:interaction.name: InnerLaunchCommand
NOM:interaction.semantics: Receive Internal launch command(CommunicationManager to LauncherControlManager)

NOM:interaction.name: InnerStartMLS
NOM:interaction.semantics: Receive Internal start simulation command(ScenarioManager to LauncherControlManager)

NOM:interaction.name: InnerStopMLS
NOM:interaction.semantics: Receive Internal stop simulation command(ScenarioManager to LauncherControlManager)

NOM:interaction.name: InnerIgnitionCommand
NOM:interaction.semantics: Send Internal ignition command(LauncherControlManager to CommunicationManager)
